data.title: RED: Update tests for hook_worktree_isolation_guard function allowlist
data.description:
## Description

Update tests for the hook_worktree_isolation_guard function in session-misc-functions.sh to assert auth-file allowlist behavior. Tests must FAIL (RED) against the current function which categorically denies.

### Tests to add/modify in tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh:
1. Update any tests that assert categorical denial of isolation:worktree to also test with auth marker present (expect allow)
2. Add test_function_allows_with_valid_marker: Source session-misc-functions.sh, create auth marker, call hook_worktree_isolation_guard with isolation:worktree input, assert return 0 (no deny)
3. Add test_function_blocks_without_marker: Same call without marker, assert deny output
4. Add test_function_blocks_stale_marker: Marker with dead PID, assert deny
5. Existing tests for OTHER guard functions (non-worktree) must still pass

### Test approach
Each test sources the function library, creates/removes marker files, calls hook_worktree_isolation_guard with JSON input, and asserts on return value and stdout. Behavioral tests — no source grepping.

### Files to modify
- tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh (EDIT)

### Fuzzy-match note
Source file session-misc-functions.sh is NOT fuzzy-matchable to test-sub-agent-guard.sh. Verify .test-index entry exists or add one.

### TDD Requirement
New tests must FAIL against current hook_worktree_isolation_guard (categorical deny).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass after Task 4 implements the allowlist in the function
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
- [ ] New auth marker tests exist for the function version
  Verify: grep -c 'test_function.*marker\|marker.*function' tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry maps session-misc-functions.sh to test-sub-agent-guard.sh (if not already present)
  Verify: grep -q 'session-misc-functions' .test-index || echo "already matched via fuzzy"
